metadata.displayName: Send a confirmation email to the farmer via SendGrid
Build the final output after sending the email

script.code:
return {
  applicationReference: null,
  confirmationEmailSent: false,
  submissionStatus: "Validation Failed",
  validationError: $context.outputs.Validate_Inputs.validationError,
  applicationLetterText: null,
  farmerName: $input.farmerName,
  farmerEmail: $input.farmerEmail,
  farmLocation: $input.farmLocation,
  message: "Application submission failed due to validation errors."
};

metadata.displayName: Build the final output after failed validation
Check if the input validation was successful
Return the final result of the application submission
